createnewindustry.ponder.mechanical_cent: Processing Items with the Mechanical Centrifuge
With a Centrifuge and Basin, some Crafting Recipes can be automated
The centrifuge operates only in the correct direction of rotation
Use the engineer's goggles to check if the centrifuge is spinning in the right direction
Some of those recipes may require the heat of a Blaze Burner.
The filter slot can be used in case two recipes are conflicting.
